question: What Stellar hackathons are currently active or upcoming that I could join?

golden.answer:
A grounded answer consults the live Stellar Scout directory or research data, directly answers the question with source-supported content, and dates any version-, provider-, or availability-sensitive claim. As of 2026-07-11, the live hackathon feed returned 10 recent events; its newest result was `Stellar Hacks: Real-World ZK`, which ended 2026-07-03.

The dated example is illustrative: a later grounded answer should report what the same source basis supports at its own observation time while preserving the stable distinctions above.
keyFacts: Presents specific source-supported content as a current or dated observation rather than as an unsupported memory claim.
Makes the as-of date visible for every changeable roster, status, version, or measurement.
Identifies specific current or recently-completed hackathons from dated event records.
avoid: Do NOT call Real-World ZK currently active after 2026-07-03.
Do NOT turn a scoped catalog zero-result into a permanent global absence claim.
Do NOT present the observed live result set as a complete or permanent roster; explicitly historical facts remain historical.
golden.notes:
GT-38 CORRECTION 2026-07-10: the scoped live feed returned zero active/upcoming rows; Real-World ZK completed July 3. Grade dated source-bound reporting and live re-check guidance, not hidden operation use.
GT-38 independently confirmed by processes 3297/3299.

corroboration.claim: The dated Scout feed returned zero active and zero upcoming rows on 2026-07-10; Real-World ZK completed July 3
